name: Med Spa
title: AI Tools for Med Spas | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for med spas — convert consultations, drive rebooking and memberships, and follow up on every lead. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Med spa treatments are higher-ticket and consultation-led, and most need a series to deliver results. We build the tools that convert the lead, book the series, and keep members coming back.
drains: Consultation inquiries that need a fast, confident reply
Treatment series and memberships that need consistent rebooking
Leads that go quiet after the first inquiry
The front desk balancing high-value bookings with everything else

tools.title: Consultation assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant, informed reply about treatments and a consultation booked — so high-intent leads don't drift to whichever med spa answered first.

tools.title: Lead follow-up assistant
tools.body: Leads who inquire but don't book get a well-timed, tactful follow-up — the difference between a lead lost and a consultation on the calendar.

tools.title: Rebooking & membership assistant
tools.body: It keeps treatment series on schedule and introduces memberships at the right moment, protecting the recurring revenue that makes a med spa stable.

tools.title: Daily clinic brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's consultations and treatments by provider, open slots, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A med spa with high-intent leads going cold.
cases.before: Inquiries that didn't book right away got no structured follow-up.
cases.after: Every lead followed up tactfully until they book or opt out.
cases.impact: Representative result: more consultations booked from the same lead volume.

cases.context: A med spa with inconsistent series rebooking.
cases.before: Treatment-series appointments slipped because rebooking wasn't tracked.
cases.after: Series kept on schedule with automatic, well-timed nudges.
cases.impact: Representative result: better treatment outcomes and steadier recurring revenue.

faq.q: Can it answer treatment questions accurately?
faq.a: We train it on your treatment menu and the questions you choose to let it answer. Anything clinical or sensitive is routed to your staff — it informs and books, it doesn't give medical advice.

faq.q: How does it protect recurring revenue?
faq.a: It keeps treatment series on schedule and introduces memberships at natural moments, so the recurring side of the business stays strong.

faq.q: Will it work with my med spa software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Mindbody, Boulevard, Aesthetic Record, or whatever you already use.
